display_name: Add Ollama Proxy Routes to site_kb_server
description: Verify qwen2.5 is available in Ollama, add proxy routes (/api/ollama/health, /api/ollama/tags, /api/ollama/generate, /api/ollama/chat) to site_kb_server.py so Windows IDE can reach Ubuntu Ollama via ngrok. Install requests lib. Restart server and verify public proxy endpoint.
